narrative: Sprint 17: API authentication routes (Feature 4.1 - Sign-in & Connect). Created multi-tenant MSAL client (authority=common), session extraction utilities, 5 preflight probes (RBAC/Cosmos/KV/Storage/AppInsights), auth router with 4 endpoints (connect/disconnect/preflight/health), API test suite (5 tests, 100% pass), and React LoginPage with MSAL.js integration. Foundation established for subscriber connection flow.
